special_mechanics.name: Spacecraft Flight Dynamics
special_mechanics.description: Simplistic flight dynamics with conservation of momentum. Players control spacecraft by mouse pointing/clicking. Ships can cut power to engines and drift along original path while turning to face any direction.

special_mechanics.name: Trade Lane Travel
special_mechanics.description: Series of connected gates forming space highways that allow rapid transit between points of interest within a system

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Qualitative/empirical data only. Game is a space trading and combat simulator with spacecraft physics, not player character platformer physics. No detailed movement parameters documented in Wikipedia source. Physics focus is on spacecraft momentum and flight dynamics rather than character movement.
